name: Shenzhen Kexin Communication Technologies Co.,Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Kexin Communication Technologies Co.,Ltd engages in the research, development, manufacture, and marketing of telecom communication network equipment in China and internationally. It offers ODN products, including no jumper optical cable cross-connecting cabinets, fiber distribution boxes, optical passive accessories, multi-media boxes, outdoor cabinets, and fiber terminal products; and wireless access products that comprise mini cabinets, fiber terminal boxes, wireless access decoration antennas, RF passive devices, and power distribution products. The company also provides integrated network cabinets consisting of fiber distribution products, traditional optical cable cross-connecting cabinets, and digital distribution frames; main distribution frames; and intelligent ODN products, including intelligent optical distribute frames, intelligent optical cable cross-connecting cabinets, intelligent fiber distribution boxes, intelligent management terminals, intelligent ODN management systems, intelligent patch cords and pigtails, and intelligent optical splitters with pigtails. In addition, it offers solutions in the areas of communication product distribution, integrated communication network, and communication network topology. Further, the company provides application solutions; and offers technical services in the areas of engineering construction, operating, and maintenance. Its products and solutions are used in FTTX, 3G/4G, and transmission networks. The company serves telecom operators, ICT equipment manufacturers, and network integrators. Shenzhen Kexin Communication Technologies Co.,Ltd was founded in 2001 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
